{"society_power": 6.5, "state_power": 7.5, "society_change": 0.5, "state_change": 1.0, "key_event": "Popular Front governance and CORFO-led state industrialization", "reasoning": "The Popular Front incorporated labor and middle classes, modestly strengthening society, though corporatist channeling and the 1947 anti-Communist turn capped gains; CORFO and wartime intervention markedly expanded the state's developmental and administrative capacity."}
